title: Junior Investment Banker at Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd!
